aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the book's uncomfortable overlaps: desire entangled with access, wonder contaminated by biotech history, class need shaping erotic choices, and ecological harm rendered at creature scale. When a scene sits on the edge between restraint and retreat, keep the pressure visible through bodies, residue, changed behavior, or social cost. If an exact detail would make the material more embarrassing, more sensual, or more morally compromising, that is usually the detail to keep.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, ecological damage, class shame, or moral compromise are softened into tasteful fog at the moment they should bite, the scene has failed and must be rewritten at higher specificity.

example_lines: CALIBRATION ONLY - NON-COPYABLE: "You don't come this far into tannin water because you enjoy mosquitoes. You come because something down here has your name in its mouth."
CALIBRATION ONLY - NON-COPYABLE: "If I wanted innocence I'd have picked a cleaner marsh and a different body."
character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid self-pity speeches, generic damaged-girl bravado, tidy moral summaries of her own guilt, or inspirational nature-guide patter.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Leans on field precision, bodily sensation, weather, water movement, and practical labor; flirtation makes her diction more tactile and less taxonomic.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Hungrier, saltier, more sensual, and less defended; shame makes her blunt rather than confessional.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate to high; profanity rises with humiliation, manual work, and sexual frankness, but she can suppress it instantly around guests or officials.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Capable, lightly ironic, and donor-safe when she must be; she can turn field knowledge into smooth guide talk without sounding formal.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Under pressure she answers too quickly, overnames details to regain control, and shifts toward cool compression when she is one question away from panic.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Observational sentences that gather texture and classification, then snap into short declaratives when she feels cornered.

example_lines: CALIBRATION ONLY - NON-COPYABLE: "The county acts like gas evaporates out of pure disrespect. Funny how it only evaporates from my ledger."
CALIBRATION ONLY - NON-COPYABLE: "I know where the channels go in the dark. That's not the same thing as saying I know what's right."
character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid macho posturing, interchangeable bad-boy flirtation, or speech that makes him sound like a noir criminal instead of an overworked county boatman.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Mechanical detail, tide sense, local shorthand, work jokes, and sensory language grounded in engines, fuel, insects, and weather.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: More tender and more bitter than his public self, with flashes of class shame he tries to bury under humor and competence.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: High; swearing is ordinary weather for him, though the tone can shift from comic to cutting fast.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Dry, teasing, locally fluent, and never eager to sound impressed; he speaks like a man who resents officials but knows exactly how to charm them when necessary.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Stress first sharpens him into logistical precision; if pushed past that point, he gets meaner by getting quieter, not louder.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Short to medium sentences, easy contractions, hard pivots into specificity when machinery, tides, or money enter the conversation.

example_lines: CALIBRATION ONLY - NON-COPYABLE: "I don't need a clean version. I need the version that explains what I have to live next to."
CALIBRATION ONLY - NON-COPYABLE: "Bats forgive bad weather. They do not forgive stupid lighting."
character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid cold-genius stiffness, therapist clichés, or generic wise-wife dialogue that exists only to diagnose other people.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Scientific language stripped of jargon bloat, cave-and-nocturnal imagery, legal or procedural terms used as emotional tools, and an undercurrent of mordant humor.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Warmer, funnier, and more erotic than her public self, but still exacting; intimacy makes her more direct, not softer.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate; she swears sparingly enough that it lands hard when it appears, especially in scientific or institutional contexts.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Measured, dry, technically precise, and harder to flatter than most people expect; she does not waste breath on social padding she does not believe in.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Stress makes her hyper-attentive to exact wording, then abruptly silent when language stops being useful; touch and eye contact become more intentional, not more frequent.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Controlled syntax with clean subordination and deliberate emphasis; when emotionally exposed, she becomes plainer rather than more ornate.

example_lines: CALIBRATION ONLY - NON-COPYABLE: "People will fund a miracle, a scandal, or a funeral. They almost never fund maintenance."
CALIBRATION ONLY - NON-COPYABLE: "I did not build this place so rich birders could mistake their appetite for stewardship, but here we all are."
character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid generic stern-boss dialogue, donor satire that turns her cartoonish, or noble-explicit speeches about saving nature.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Budget terms, species detail, grant rhetoric, and old-school naturalist precision under layers of hospitality language.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Exhausted, cutting, and still capable of the old field-biologist ferocity she mostly keeps holstered.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Low to moderate; profanity is rare, chosen, and usually a sign that she has stopped performing professionalism.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Polished, donor-literate, and authoritative without theatricality; she can speak fluent institutional reassurance while sounding almost sincere.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Under strain she becomes more formal for a few beats, then abruptly personal and unsparing when the facade fails.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Well-shaped sentences, lower contraction rate than the others, careful clause control, and a tendency to sound managerial until anger strips that away.

example_lines: CALIBRATION ONLY - NON-COPYABLE: "If the roof comes off, at least the spoonbills get a better angle on us."
CALIBRATION ONLY - NON-COPYABLE: "I make jokes because if I don't, somebody hands me a bucket and suddenly it's my tragedy too."
character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid sitcom quips, meme-speak, or making him the disposable comic-relief witness to adult misery.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Kitchen and dock slang, bits of bird knowledge picked up by ear, and youthful turns of phrase that still sound place-specific rather than generic.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: More ambitious and more tender than his clowning suggests; embarrassment shows up as jokes with a crack in them.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate to high; casual profanity is normal, but he self-censors around Imogen more than around anyone else.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Quick, funny, apparently unserious, and observant enough to know when adults are lying in front of him.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: He talks more when scared, then goes nearly formal when something truly hurts or shames him.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Fast speech, clipped but grammatical, with sudden sincerity when he forgets to protect himself.

example_lines: CALIBRATION ONLY - NON-COPYABLE: "Nobody remembers who carried the cooler. They remember who could describe the thing inside it."
CALIBRATION ONLY - NON-COPYABLE: "A story stops being theft the second enough money calls it research."
character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid obvious villain monologues, campy predatory charm, or dialogue that explains his manipulation too neatly.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Guide folklore, faux-mystical nature language, and manipulative uses of shared memory and inside terminology.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Seductive, evasive, and allergic to accountability; he prefers reframing to admitting fault.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate; he swears like a man curating roughness rather than living inside it.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Charismatic elder-guide ease with a faint guru sheen; he sounds trustworthy until the self-protective turn arrives.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: When pressured he gets smoother before he gets honest, then abruptly minimalist once he senses real legal danger.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Loping sentences with practiced rhythm, rhetorical questions, and the habit of making complicity sound like intimacy.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the norm in spoken dialogue; uncontracted forms should signal deliberate emphasis, institutional performance, or a character-specific formality shift.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate compression and dilation aggressively: single-scene nocturnes, comic paperwork chapters, quiet survey chapters, domestic weather chapters, confrontational set pieces, and aftermath chapters should sit beside each other without repeating the same rhythm two chapters in a row.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, coastal, and exact without brochure prettiness; scientific and bureaucratic terms may appear when the characters would think or speak through them, but they should stay embodied by consequence.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Mina Cordero, with free-indirect access tight enough to track bodily desire, shame, and observational obsession without collapsing into confessional summary
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple sentence music that can hold humidity, rot, and erotic charge, then cut hard into blunt compression at moments of humiliation, procedural friction, or ecological damage.
